hero.title: Full Stack
hero.subtitle: JS Developer.
hero.desc: Epitech Paris graduate (Software Architect, Master's level) with 2 years of professional experience. Proficient in React, Node.js and both relational and NoSQL databases. Reliable, autonomous and a team player.

about.title: About
about.heading: Full Stack JS Developer — Epitech Graduate
about.p1: Graduated in August 2024 with a Software Architect degree from Epitech Paris (Master's level). I have 2 years of hands-on professional experience on real-world web projects.
about.p2: I am looking for a permanent position in the Paris area within a structured technical team, where I can apply my skills and keep growing.
